name: agent-skill-debloater
description: Plugin-first searchable catalogs for hidden/read-on-demand agent skill packs.

interface.shortDescription: Tiny router skills for large searchable skill catalogs
interface.longDescription: Use AgentSkillDebloater to keep curated skill packs hidden by default while router skills search compact catalogs and return exact SKILL.md read paths with selected-skill audit traces.
defaultPrompt: Search the Design Studio for the right backing skill.
Search the Marketing Studio for the right backing skill.
